prompt: A horses and automobiles sharing the same street — the old world and the new — orthochromatic silent film rendering, the frame containing horse-drawn delivery wagons — the economy of centuries and early automobiles — the internal combustion engine as the future simultaneously: the world in the act of becoming something it has not yet finished becoming, delivery workers, pedestrians, policemen — managing the new traffic with rules built for the old visible in the frame going about their day in a world that is changing around them without their full awareness, a crossing point — where horse and automobile must negotiate passage the frame's central visual argument — the old and new sharing the same street, the same moment, cinematic silent film transition world still, 4:3
